update.releaseNotes:
v5.7.6 - Changelog
New --- - Add a `Sync Priorities` button to the `Training Settings` page that will sync the priorities of the `Event Choice Prioritization` and `Summer Training Prioritization` settings with their parent `Prioritization` setting. - Add per-character mandatory races to the Smart Race Solver automatically to lock off those days to avoid the Solver scheduling races on those days by accident.
Fixes --- - Fix section dividers having the wrong margins.
